_comment: Pinned container boot-artifact versions/digests for #616 (distribution-grade provisioning). Read/written by scripts/vendor-container-kernel.sh --update-lock and verified by scripts/check-container-resources.sh. Committed (not gitignored) — this is metadata, not a vendored binary.
